'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 4''' was published in January [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—From Youth to Man", by [[John May]]: an extended profile of the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].
*"The Building of [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]]," by [[Jon Trux]]: A behind-the-scenes look at how [[John Stears]] built the famous [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]].
*"[[Soldiers of the Empire!]]," by [[Anthony Fredrickson]]: a description of the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Imperial Stormtroopers]], covering origins, training, promotions, and retirement. This article describes Stormtroopers as [[Cloning/Legends|clones]], though it was written well before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] or [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']].
